expected_external_effect: Would create exactly one GitHub issue matching payload hash sha256:v87-github-issue-create-preflight.
allowed_actions: simulate approved GitHub issue creation payload locally
bind approval to provider operation target hash
denied_actions: execute live GitHub create_issue in v8.7 preflight
billing, secret, deploy, dangerous, or irreversible operation
redaction_boundary: No credential, token, raw private payload, or provider response body is persisted.
rollback_plan: If later execution creates the issue, rollback is delete_created_issue and must be recorded as a separate artifact.
stop_conditions: stop if target payload hash changes
stop if human approval is revoked or expired
stop if adapter operation modes do not include external_write
not_proven: This pilot proves bounded approval preflight only, not live GitHub execution safety or rollback success.
